subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my God! O Thou the Most Lauded, the Most Holy, the Most Tender, the Most Bountiful! Remove our difficulties by Thy grace and bounty. Thou art, verily, the All-Merciful, the All-Bountiful
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله البر العطوف. اللهم یا سبوح یا قدوس یا حنان یا منان فرج لنا بالفضل و الاحسان انک انت الرحمن المنان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for tests and difficulties, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
